panels.title: E2E Comprehensive Experiment - Service Graph (29 Scenarios)

targets.expr: sum(chaos_db_lock_count_total) by (db_system, lock_type) or sum(chaos_db_deadlock_count_total) by (db_system)

panels.title: MTTR (Mean Time To Recovery) by Service

title: E2E Comprehensive Chaos Experiment Dashboard
description: Extensive dashboard for the comprehensive E2E distributed transaction chaos experiment. Monitors all 29 chaos scenarios across PostgreSQL (Cache Miss, Vacuum Starvation, Temp Spill, Lock Storm, Pool Exhaustion, Query Saturation, Slow Transactions), MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, Infrastructure (CPU/Memory/Network stress), and Disaster Recovery (Primary Failover, DR Site Failover). Includes 5 minutes of continuous transaction load with real-time monitoring of all systems.
